summary: Heavily obfuscated index.js in package with confusable name
details: The package ships an index.js whose top-level code uses string-array shuffling and while(!![]) control-flow flattening — a heavily obfuscated bundle. The package name 'express-initial' is also confusable with the widely-used 'express' ecosystem. No traced behavior is available to determine whether the obfuscated code performs exfiltration, drops a remote payload, or otherwise harms installers, but obfuscation of the main module of a package using an Express-adjacent name is an unusual combination that warrants human review before allowing into builds.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
